name: Pandora
report: The _transfer function contains an integer underflow vulnerability when subtracting the transfer amount from the sender's balance. Since the contract does not use SafeMath or Solidity 0.8+'s built-in overflow checks, an attacker can trigger a balance underflow by transferring more tokens than they own. This causes the sender's balance to wrap around to a very large number due to unsigned integer arithmetic. The attacker then exploits this inflated balance to gain unauthorized Pandora tokens, effectively minting tokens out of thin air.
